failedAssertions.reason: Hero panel with aggregate Agency/Nuance/Critical ring gauges not implemented. RingGauge component exists but only used per-radar for signal dimensions.
Firehose panel fully implemented with freshness/quality tags but shows empty state — 12 signals in DB are not threaded or associated with radars.
Action feed empty — no ConnectionOpportunity/ActionCard data generated by backend.
Thread cards not visible — 0 threads in database. UI components (EtaThreadCard + gauge bars) are implemented but no data.
No narrative branches visible — η lane radars have 0 branches in data.
No source provenance badges — requires thread.source_distribution data, 0 threads exist.
No uncertainty labels — EtaThreadCard implements uncertaintyLabel() but needs thread data.
Community readiness gauges not implemented — no component, CSS, or logic in the codebase.
Pipeline incomplete: 5 Bluesky signals collected but not associated with radars or threaded.
Pipeline incomplete: 7 Reddit signals collected but not associated with radars or threaded.
Slider changes are client-side only (localStorage). η lane radars have empty score_ranges so weight factor (weight/50) multiplies 0.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot trigger EmptyState through browser — 14 seeded radars always present, isolation rules prevent stopping backend. Component is implemented and has conditional rendering logic.
Threading pipeline incomplete — 0 threads in DB. MuThreadCard with proximity/leverage/time-to-act indicators is fully implemented and unit-tested.
0 threads prevents verification. Also, action suggestions in separate ActionFeed component (lane-level), not per-card.
Threading pipeline produces 0 threads. MuLane + MuThreadCard UI components fully implemented.

rootCauseAnalysis.description: 12 signals collected (5 Bluesky, 7 Reddit) but not associated with radars (NULL radar_id) and not clustered into threads (0 rows in threads table). This blocks all thread-dependent UI features from rendering even though the UI components are fully implemented.
No top-level hero panel with aggregate Agency/Nuance/Critical ring gauges. RingGauge component exists but only serves per-radar signal dimension display.
No CommunityReadiness component, CSS, or logic exists in the codebase. LeverageBar is the closest analog but serves different purpose.
Action feed shows empty state because the connection engine (milestone 4) has not generated data. This is expected for dashboard-mvp milestone if connection-engine features are not yet complete.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Browser (dashboard-mvp)' section with session naming, how-to, data seeding, isolation rules, and API operation examples
